textByHash.1b2a2e69391efb1ce6db4b8b2e6e6921a062c28d: You know - everytime I hear that story it seems less and less convincing...
textByHash.1efcde2515acde7f4512109ba989a5b43d22aa7c: No, it's alright, we quite like it in here.
textByHash.326b024e32e2db46c375b0abb83d705ca0084ce9: I think he knows that Lumo...
textByHash.35559a053a908eed04cd1b88d03ab1e144bfbb44: Fifteen times ... wait: is it fifteen?
textByHash.3e79f8753adcaf69b8f5594170bde4611344c603: No... don't be silly. We're here to be rescued, after all.
textByHash.3fbbdbe650ea3fd2f6a365e643abeccabc5fc5a3: That's right Lumo. Remember the time when they got all confused when changing shifts?
textByHash.5b32eea4fe84a933eb0a6c1180c83c414e8085cc: What are you looking at then? Never seen a Gnome in a Monkey jail before?
textByHash.680a0b42ad5c572cc09b1d8b68a02a92b9470f51: That has to be the worst joke I've ever heard...
textByHash.6d3df90797d8ba7146207793694b79c9b1f1a51b: I think she knows that Lumo...
textByHash.8e6fc1b13c8afd61f5eeb53930406d731e85200e: It's great to be back home, Azacor.
textByHash.94c463d363e968cd15ec0f349e9b8b09325bf44e: I turned around at the wrong time...
textByHash.a19113189584302a02f732e48fdbfcac25be5673: We'd spent so long out there on Ape Atoll I was starting to doubt I'd ever see the Grand Tree again!
textByHash.a9210cc2b3b5fe4a93f2f273d6e89f3512b28f34: Yeah I know the ones you mean...
textByHash.bc845785a0ad31bbbea9a5028aeee99393465c9d: No, it's alright, laddie, we quite like it in here.
textByHash.bf94a65f291782729787567e77e1b6569fc49bdd: If you pick with us a fight...
textByHash.cd1a7975f8f35c5a5232f2989d9e8c195e24d789: Indeed. My backside is still a little sore...
textByHash.d202a85a63699bd1a8fe26a17d01816dedc15365: That's just the Way of the World, Lumo.
textByHash.dfd8367fa137056e301d93375bcfbda6e030ea9b: No. I for one happen to like standing bolt upright all of the time.
textByHash.e6795b222490f0d263503680ba3f0b01c702fc03: Lumo, you're beginning to irritate me. Imagine what it's like for them.
textByHash.f70ac8ce335984c6411d7c1960250b713ee2f754: And which god would that be, eh?
